feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: where can i rent a good vps that wont ask for my fingerprints in order to use it…
entry.content: where can i rent a good vps that wont ask for my fingerprints in order to use it? i made an account on (((Hetzner))) and they straight up asked me for my passport and i dont wanna give it to them for obvious reasons.... I only want to host a small blog to write some reviews and journal stuff im learning or doing at the moment, so the cheapest sub 10 euros vps will be enough for me >inb4 self host i tried but my IPS won't let me port forward t.eurocel if that even matters

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: I don't often eat ice cream As nice as it is, let's face it, it's an overpriced …
entry.content: I don't often eat ice cream As nice as it is, let's face it, it's an overpriced luxury. And luxuries are getting harder and harder to afford. So when I do have ice cream, I just pick one I know I'll like, like chocolate or caramel or cookie dough or whatever. I don't really take risks or diversify. But recently, there was some discounted ice cream at Lidl. I decided to get two tubs. The first was caramel, but the second, as I had a back up option, I decided to try rum and raisin. I have to say I

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: i watch this every year on July 1st on the anniversary of the day i brought my d…
entry.content: i watch this every year on July 1st on the anniversary of the day i brought my dog home because his name was inspired by this movie. what will i think of it this time?

entry.title: /int/ International: Why would you want to experience every corner of the world?
entry.content: It's a child-like ambition, really. Not asinine, but very much naïve. I had dreams of visiting Poland, Japan, China, Australia... likely several more, yet I am okay with simply living in a local bubble. My ideal lifestyle involves living in a mobile home by myself, maybe in rural Iowa, with enough cash to never work again (at a modest lifestyle cost). Because even the "grounded" modern world is nested in layers of pointless abstractions, sometimes contradicting each other.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is it just me or has there been a major uptick in people getting hacked lately? …
entry.content: Is it just me or has there been a major uptick in people getting hacked lately? I've been noticing since like May with everyone losing their Gmail, Discord, Twitter, YouTube, Steam, etc. All this shit is apparently stemming from third/fourth worlders on Telegram who are selling off other people's accounts they've stolen just so they can recycle the same handful of scams onto other people. >MrBeast's brand new crypto casino >Hey I accidentally reported your Steam account >Watch anime with me on t

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: When I was sixteen, I won a great victory. I felt in that moment I would live to…
entry.content: When I was sixteen, I won a great victory. I felt in that moment I would live to be a hundred. Now I know I shall not see thirty. None of us know our end, really, or what hand will guide us there. A king may move a man, a father may claim a son, but that man can also move himself, and only then does that man truly begin his own game. Remember that howsoever you are played or by whom, your soul is in your keeping alone, even though those who presume to play you be kings or men of power. When you

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Freenet
entry.content: >The new Freenet (distinct from the Java-based Hyphanet fork of original Freenet) is a Rust-implemented peer-to-peer global key-value store and decentralized computing platform. >Keys are WebAssembly contracts that define (1) validity predicates for values (e.g. signature checks), (2) update authorization rules, and (3) synchronization logic expressed as commutative monoid operations on state so that concurrent updates converge to the same result regardless of order. Each contract is determinist

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I want to share a simple mod I made for my 8BitDo Arcade Stick. I added a dedica…
entry.content: I want to share a simple mod I made for my 8BitDo Arcade Stick. I added a dedicated Up button with a switch that lets me choose between using the joystick or the button instead of having both active at the same time. The reason I did this is because I had trouble hitting certain combos consistently. Using the joystick for Up wasn't always accurate enough for me, especially during fast inputs. I saw that many people either convert their stick into a Hitbox or simply wire an Up button in parallel

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Retro tech will become popular again
entry.content: I honestly see in 5-10 years a revival of 1950-1990 analogue tech. Digital will devolve into something so bad people will return to dumb phones or printed books or physical cartridges of roms. School tests will be done on manual calculators and typewtiters.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Sony is right
entry.content: Here's why Sony is making the right call overall: Physical media is old tech, just like CDs and DVDs. It was always going to disappear. However if Sony wants everyone to go fully digital, they need to let us actually transfer or sell games between accounts. Physical discs are done in 2028 and that’s fine but right now digital ownership still feels incomplete. Game sharing would be so much better without awkward Facebook Marketplace meetups or handing over your login on via a third party site I h

entry.content: Rest in piss.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >we want to show that gaming is a serious artform I hate these insecure faggots …
entry.content: >we want to show that gaming is a serious artform I hate these insecure faggots so much. They need to add this reddit shit as a way to distance themselves from their work. Because they think doing something less realistic than the Titanic is embarrassing. Can we finally move away from self-aware writing forever?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I was thinking...since physical media is going to be nonexistent for ALL gaming …
entry.content: I was thinking...since physical media is going to be nonexistent for ALL gaming platforms soon... What exactly is stopping a new company from coming along and making a console that can publish and play physical games? All entertainment mediums eventually have something like this for enthusiasts...what's stopping this from happening with a gaming system? A gaming system where the whole selling point is that it can play physical copies of all modern 3rd party games? I mean if no gaming company is

entry.content: The Home of Doerot & Kriselle. entry.title: /b/ Random: Why do people say Chavs are dangerous?
entry.content: >Be me >Be the smaller kid, easily picked on >Chav lads in gold were consistently the ones to protect me from bullying >Chavs were really nice >Never had one bad experience with them and I live in a "chav ridden" city so I've had 20+ years of experience with chavs. >A random pair of chavs in their mid 20's/early 30's talked me out of suicide a few years ago >Not the first time Chavs have appeared out of nowhere to save me from some kind of crisis This is seriously the UK's most hated subculture?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: /WLB/ We Love Betty General #2
entry.content: Betty is an internet personality that first appeared on fishtank season 1. She is a very talented artist of the odd and bizarre. Unique and mysterious, this thread is dedicated to her honor. These are her socials x.com/BallerinaBitty kick.com/betty_fae etsy.com/shop/bettyfae/ News: Betty will be starting a new themed streaming schedule: White Trashed Wednesdays (be depressing and trashy *like me*) Freak off Fridays (diddy parties) Silly Sundays (???) Be sure to tune in at kick.com/betty_fae

entry.title: /int/ International: Where all my LBC niggas at? I saw the Spain team running on the beach by Alamito…
entry.content: Where all my LBC niggas at? I saw the Spain team running on the beach by Alamitos on my way to work today and made sure to flip them all off and give them a couple "Viva Mexico, maricones". It was totally epic. Word on the street is those broke ass white boys are going to be hold up at a discount motel on Ocean Blvd, any fellow LBC niggas wanna meet up and make noise outside their motel until 4am?

entry.title: /mu/ Music: How to power through the cringe of your lyrics?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: videogames arent fun anymore
entry.content: tried playing cod again but i just cant the lobbies are unbearable and im not gonna camp like a pussy, mouse and keyboard players ruin fun for everyone its only campers and sweats, pvp in general fucking sucks if you dont play every day sorry for having a life and hobbies, new releases are bad programmed woke slop resident evil requiem fucking sucks its all so fucking shit nowadays the only game im waiting for is mortal shell 2 i just wanna have fun without needing to play for hours every day it
